prompt: anime illustration, light novel style, panoramic view of a grand magical academy with seven white spires resembling a giant pipe organ against a golden sunrise sky, a 16-year-old girl with black hair and gray-blue eyes standing on a hilltop overlooking the academy, she wears a school uniform and holds a leather-bound notebook to her chest, wind blowing her hair, musical notes and glowing sound waves flowing through the air around the towers, a small mechanical copper bird flying beside her, magical energy in the form of colorful sound waves weaving between the spires, ethereal and melancholic yet hopeful atmosphere, highly detailed fantasy academy landscape
